title: Helmet Craft (Ancestral Tiara — Double ES + Double Resist or +2 Minion Sell)
goal: Ancestral Tiara with T1 %ES + T1 maximum ES OR a hybrid double-ES setup, paired with double resistance / rarity / +2 minion suffix. +2 minions is a sell-back candidate for big profit.

baseRequirements.hint: Ancestral Tiara is the target base. You'll burn through a few bases looking for the right magic 2-mod combo in step 1.

steps.title: Perfect Transmute + Aug → magic with T1 %ES or T1 Max ES prefix
steps.description:
You'll need multiple bases for this step. Apply Perfect Transmute + Perfect Aug looking for:

• Prefix: T1 %ES or T1 Maximum ES (NOT hybrid — hybrid bricks the craft).
• Suffix: any resistance, rarity, or +2 minion mod.

If prefix lands hybrid → discard, try next base.
steps.stopLoss: Hybrid % es + max es is a brick. Don't try to recover — start fresh with a new base.

steps.title: Greater Rarity / Greater Resistance Essence → upgrade to 3-mod rare
steps.description: Apply a Greater Rarity essence or any Greater Resistance essence. End state should be: T1 ES prefix + (double resistance OR rarity/resistance) suffix.

steps.title: Dextral Necromancy + Preserved Rib → fill suffix
steps.description: Use Omen of Dextral Necromancy with Preserved Rib to fill the remaining suffix slot. Don't unveil yet — that comes in step 4.

steps.title: Homogenising + Greater + Perfect Exalt → finish prefixes (RISKY)
steps.description:
Use Omen of Homogenising Exaltation + Omen of Greater Exaltation + Perfect Exalted Orb.

This step can BRICK. There is a low chance to hit double hybrid (bad — bricks the helmet). More likely: lands the other ES affix + one hybrid affix.

If bricked, the only saves are Chaos Orb or Annul → high risk of total loss.
steps.stopLoss: If this step lands double hybrid, the helmet is bricked. Decide your max loss tolerance BEFORE slamming this step.

steps.title: Unveil suffix with Abyssal Echoes
steps.description:
With prefixes locked, unveil your final suffix using Abyssal Echoes. Target priorities (descending): resistance, rarity, +2 minions.

→ Hit +2 minions? Sell the helmet for big profit — even though we don't use minions, +2 minion ancestral tiaras are in massive demand.

pricingTips: +2 Minions Ancestral Tiara → sell as-is, the price is much higher than a usable helmet for your own build.
If keeping for yourself, list comparable rolled helmets to set your asking price.
notes: Hybrid ES prefix (%es + max es combined as one mod) is the gotcha — it kills the craft at step 0.
Step 3 has real brick risk. Don't slam this craft on a base you can't afford to lose.
